$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability.
name: DealForge Assistant
description: Sales/deal pipeline assistant: summarises leads and opportunities, drafts follow-up messages, and writes deal-stage notes.

envVars.name: DEALFORGE_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.

envVars.name: DEALFORGE_CRM_PROVIDER
envVars.description: Optional CRM backend (none|hubspot|pipedrive). Credentials configured in n8n, not the repo.

envVars.name: DEALFORGE_PIPELINE_STAGES
envVars.description: Comma-separated pipeline stage names for stage notes.
